column1: Which of the following is equivalent to cscA + cotA ?
column6:
Start by rewriting everything in terms of sine and cosine:
csc A= 1/sin A? cot A = cos A/sin A

So,

csc A + cot A = 1/sin A + cos/sin A

Combine the fractions:

= 1 + cos A/sin A
